title: Vote security, SSR auth foundation and audit fixes

transitions.note: Audit fixes implemented; typecheck/lint/test green. Awaiting build, docs:check, commit and deploy.

Local release-gate checks passed again with v0.7.0-alpha.1 working tree: typecheck, lint, test, build, docs:check, state:check and local smoke. Awaiting commit, migration reconciliation and preview verification.
Release-gate blockers closed: protected Vercel Preview verified via automation bypass; remote Supabase reconciliation migration 20260617212741 applied and verified. Awaiting commit/release sign-off.
Protected Preview smoke was verified through Vercel automation bypass tooling.
Final verification: preview dpl_DLN6fRpAsjd6CCcBsncK4iu2WZiX is READY and protected Preview API checks passed through Vercel curl; production smoke passed with 16 models after DB reconciliation.
Offline checks pass (typecheck, lint, docs:check, state:check). Build verified via Vercel production deployment 25a651f (READY). Smoke verified via live production endpoint.

notes: Closes audit nuances: server-authoritative vote identity via @supabase/ssr, middleware session refresh, vote rate-limit, atomic cast_best_vote RPC, route error/loading/not-found boundaries, removal of the already-documented-as-removed /arena-voting alias, and a Node .nvmrc pin. Migration reconciliation and protected Preview verification are complete; remains in verify until commit/release sign-off.
